subcodes.title: Words spoken at 227 Riverside Drive in New York, 1912-11-12
subcodes.first_line: I deal with the poor and visit them, not the rich. I love all, especially the poor. All sorts of people come here and I meet them
subcodes.first_line_orig: من با فقرا کار دارم و بمحل فقرا میروم نه اغنیا جمیع را من دوست دارم علی الخصوص فقرا را
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
